name: @fortium/ensemble-codex
description: Codex CLI runtime support — translates Ensemble artifacts into Codex-compatible agents and skills

scripts.validate:version: node -e "const p=require('./package.json');const c=require('./.claude-plugin/plugin.json');if(p.version!==c.version){console.error('Version mismatch: package.json='+p.version+' plugin.json='+c.version);process.exit(1)}console.log('Version sync OK:',p.version)"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run generate && npm run test && npm run validate:version && npm pack --dry-run
